doNotOverstate: Do not import BWV unless the papers support it.
Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Assumed position may conflict with interview or served evidence.
Do not state "CAD/999 timing supports" — CAD/999 material is not safely on file as served

Do not import co-defendant material (MG6C/CO — co-defendant-only — co-defendant segregation map (Crane / folio 173) — not this defendant — outstanding — not on bundle.) to this defendant's case theory.

Do not import co-defendant material (Co-defendant-only — Outstanding: full download — Willa Crane; search terms schedule — Willa Crane; co-defendant segregation map (Crane / folio 173). — not this defendant) to this defendant's case theory.
Do not import co-defendant material (Co-defendant-only — co-defendant segregation map (Crane / folio 173) — not this defendant) to this defendant's case theory.
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.
